key.name: show-empty-ports
key.description: If true, list USB-C ports that have no device connected.

key.name: show-internal-devices
key.description: If true, include built-in (non-removable) USB devices such as internal hubs and webcams.

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often the panel icon's wattage/device-count badge polls sysfs. The full menu always refreshes when opened.

key.name: show-details
key.description: If true, expand a Details section under each device with raw fields (vendor IDs, bus/device numbers, VDO-decoded partner/cable info, etc.).
